meta.title: Learning from the Romans
meta.sourceDoc: 43. P2 - Learning from the Romans 罗马混凝土.pdf
meta.matchedTitle: Learning from the Romans 罗马混凝土

passageNotes.label: Source
passageNotes.text: Explanations were extracted from the answer-analysis table in the source PDF by OCR. Minor OCR mistakes may remain; the official answer key is used for the answer field.

questionSections.text:
题目 14
答案：D
PDF 定位："As the Roman Empire declined, and shipping declined, the need for the seawater concrete declined... You could also argue that the original structures were built so well that..they didn't need to be replaced.""（第D段）
PDF 解析：题干：为何罗马人减少用于海水环境的混凝土产量。D段给出两种原因 性观点：①帝国与航运衰落→需求下降；②原有构筑物太耐久→无需替 换。符合"an opinion on why...reducedtheamount"。

题目 15
答案：B
PDF 定位："Portland cement is a compound of calcium, silicates, and hydrates (C-S-H)... Roman cement contains aluminum... and less silicon... The resulting calcium-aluminum-silicate-hydrate (C-A-S-H)..." (第B段)
PDF 解析：题干：列出波特兰水泥与罗马水泥的成分。B段先给出Portland成分 (calcium/silicates/hydrates），再给出Roman的差异（含aluminum、 lesssilicon、形成C-A-S-H)。是对两者成分的并列说明/清单。

题目 16
答案：F
PDF 定位：* There is not enough fly ash in this world to replace half of the Portland cement being used... Many countries don't have fly ash, so the idea is to find alternative local materials... including the kind ofvolcanic ashthatRomans used."（第F段)
PDF 解析：题干：为一种有限资源寻找替代品的论证。F段指出粉煤灰（flyash) 量不足且分布不均，因此主张寻找替代材料（如火山灰)。这正是"an argument for finding substitutes"。

题目 17
答案：A
PDF 定位："...samples taken froma concrete Romanbreakwater... This particular breakwater has spent the last 2,ooo years submerged in seawater... collected from the underwater site in Pozzuoli Bay nearNaples inItaly."（第A段）
PDF 解析：题干：科学家取得罗马混凝土样本的结构信息。A段明确样本来自防波 堤（breakwater)，且说明其地点与长期浸没海水的状态。

题目 18
答案：E
PDF 定位："Producing Roman concrete also left a smaller carbon footprint... manufacturing Portland cementaccounts for sevenpercent of the carbon dioxide... making Portland cement releases carbon dioxide... The production of Roman concrete, however, was much cleaner,as lessheatwasneeded."（第E段）
PDF 解析：题干：比较现代与罗马混凝土环境影响。E段直接对比"碳足迹/CO2占 比/所需热量"，属于环境影响的对比。

题目 19
答案：G
PDF 定位："In the middle 20th century, concrete structures were designed to last 50 years... Now we design buildings to last 100 to 120 years. Yet Roman harbor installations have survived 2,ooo years of chemicalattack..."（第G段）
PDF 解析：题干：比较耐久性。G段把现代设计寿命（50→100-120年）与罗马港口 构筑物存续2000年直接对照。

题目 20
答案：C
PDF 定位：..woodenmolds,which were then immersed in seawater. The seawater instantly triggered a hot chemicalreaction. The lime was hydrated by the seawater..and reacted with the volcanic ashtocementthewholemixturetogether."（第c段)
PDF 解析：题干：罗马人如何利用海水制混凝土。C段按步骤描写浸入海水→放热 反应→石灰水化→与火山灰反应→固结，符合"detailsof how"。

questionSections.text:
题目 21
答案：A
PDF 定位：A项依据：...instead,flyashisused,whichcausesfewer greenhousegasemissions."（第F段）；C项依据："Somemodern concrete no longer contains Portland cement; instead, fly ash is used."（第F段）
PDF 解析：A真：粉煤灰导致更少温室气体排放（=对环境破坏更小)。C真：当下 已有部分混凝土使用粉煤灰。B假：罗马人用的是火山灰，非粉煤灰 (第C段)。D假：第F段说"Manycountriesdon'thaveflyash"。E 未提/不成立：文中并无"粉煤灰很快取代火山灰"的论断；相反是在探 索以火山灰等替代粉煤灰/波特兰水泥。

题目 22
答案：C
PDF 定位：A项依据：...instead,flyashisused,whichcausesfewer greenhousegasemissions."（第F段）；C项依据："Somemodern concrete no longer contains Portland cement; instead, fly ash is used."（第F段）
PDF 解析：A真：粉煤灰导致更少温室气体排放（=对环境破坏更小)。C真：当下 已有部分混凝土使用粉煤灰。B假：罗马人用的是火山灰，非粉煤灰 (第C段)。D假：第F段说"Manycountriesdon'thaveflyash"。E 未提/不成立：文中并无"粉煤灰很快取代火山灰"的论断；相反是在探 索以火山灰等替代粉煤灰/波特兰水泥。

questionSections.text:
题目 23
答案：limestone
PDF 定位：...toheatamixof limestoneandclays to1,450°C.."（第E段）
PDF 解析：题干"combineclaysand_tomakePortland cement"与原文 "amixoflimestoneandclays"同义对应；注意单词作不可数。

题目 24
答案：third
PDF 定位："A temperature that was a third lower than that required for makingPortland cementwas sufficient..."（第E段)
PDF 解析：罗马混凝土所需温度比波特兰水泥低三分之一，对应"reduced by a third"

题目 25
答案：fuel
PDF 定位："...releases carbon dioxide... from burning fuel in order to heat.." (第E段)
PDF 解析：低温意味着需要燃烧的**燃料（fuel)**更少，从而减少CO2。

题目 26
答案：industry
PDF 定位："...manufacturing Portland cementaccounts for seven percent of the carbon dioxide that industry puts into the air."(第E段)
PDF 解析：题干"cOzemitted by"与原文"industryputs into theair" 致，用单词industry。
